name: Stir-Fried Bow Ties w/ Chicken, Broccoli & To
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Bow ties, rotini or other (shaped pasta) - uncooked
12 oz Chicken breasts, boneless, skinless & cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package directions.
2. While the pasta is cooking, stir the soy sauce and cornstarch together in a small bowl until cornstarch is dissolved. Stir in chicken broth; set aside.
3. Heat oil in a large wok over high heat. Stir in onion and garlic. Stir until onion is wilted, about 2 minutes.
4. Add chicken and stir until it turns white, about 2 minutes.
5. Add broccoli and stir until it turns bright green, about 1 minute.
6. Add the chicken broth mixture: bring to a boil. Cover wok and cook until chicken is cooked through and broccoli is tender, about 3 minutes.
7. Add pasta and stir to coat with sauce. Add cherry tomatoes and serve immediately.
Note:
If you don't have a wok large enough to hold all the ingredients (including the pasta), prepare the sauce separately in a large skillet. After draining the pasta, return it to the pot, pour the finished sauce into the pot and stir over low heat until pasta is coated with sauce.
